meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Speed Up Freelance Dev for Beginners
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with basic apps. Learn how to leverage AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients today.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors manually. By integrating Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for real-time CLI debugging, you shift from manual troubleshooting to automated resolution. This workflow reduces debugging time by 70%, allowing you to focus on high-value features and faster delivery for your freelance clients.
content.intro:
The screen is glowing, the coffee is cold, and you are staring at a stack trace that makes no sense. As a freelancer, every hour spent hunting a semicolon is an hour you aren't billing or building. You’ve hit the 'basic app' wall, where your growth is throttled by your ability to resolve bugs quickly.

But the era of manual debugging is over. By deploying AI-driven agents directly into your development workflow, you transform from a lone coder into a lead engineer supported by an infinite pair-programming team. It is time to stop guessing and start deploying.

steps.title: Initialize the Contextual Workspace
steps.description: Before debugging, you must provide the AI with the architectural context of your project to prevent hallucinations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and generate a dependency map. Identify any circular references or anti-patterns that could lead to runtime errors.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use AI to trace the execution path of the failing feature, effectively narrowing the search field from the entire codebase to the specific module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Trace the error in the authentication module. Identify the specific function causing the unhandled promise rejection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'find the source of the authentication error in /src/auth'

steps.title: Simulate and Verify Fixes
steps.description: Don't push directly to production. Use AI to generate a targeted unit test that replicates the bug, then fix it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Jest test case that replicates the current runtime error. Propose a code patch to resolve it.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a failing test case for the bug, then implement a fix'

steps.title: Refactor for Defensive Programming
steps.description: Once the bug is squashed, have the AI refactor the surrounding code to ensure similar errors don't surface again.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the patched function. Refactor it to include robust error handling and type safety using TypeScript.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor the patched module to follow defensive programming best practices'

steps.title: Automated Documentation Update
steps.description: Keep your client documentation in sync with your changes automatically so you look professional without the extra manual labor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a technical summary of the fix and update the README.md documentation accordingly.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'update technical documentation based on the recent patches'

pro_tips: Always use the 'Explain' flag in Claude Code to understand the logic behind a suggested fix before applying it.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Architecture Reports' for your clients; it adds a layer of professional transparency that justifies higher rates.
Configure your AI agents to strictly follow your project's ESLint rules to prevent 'AI-style' code drift.
When stuck, ask the AI to 'Assume the persona of a senior Staff Engineer at Google' to get more rigorous, scalable architectural advice.
Save your most successful Antigravity prompts in a local 'Prompt Library' folder to standardize your debugging process across different freelance projects.
resources: State of AI Dev Report: https://ai-builder-community.io/stats
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin integrating automated CI/CD pipelines to trigger these AI debugging steps on every pull request.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading time for errors. Master these tools and reclaim your freelance freedom. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
